behavior_summary: Provides GWILLIM NPC behavior: handles player 'U8P_GWILLIM::look' interaction, theft reactions, schedule-driven short behaviors, and fast-area entry/exit cleanup.
GWILLIM::look chooses between a first-meeting greeting and a repeat greeting based on a global flag metGwillim.

GWILLIM::AvatarStoleSomething processes an avatar theft event: records the stolen item, resets internal refs, inspects the stolen type, sets stolenOnce for some classes, issues vocal warnings, and (if appropriate and not already done) spawns guard-calling routines and timers.
GWILLIM::schedule queries an external schedule utility (FREE::28F9) to select and persist a gwillimSchedule value and then spawns short schedule-methods to enact that plan.

GWILLIM::enterFastArea reacts to fast-area entry by clearing refs, checking gwillimSchedule, and spawning one of several short behavior helpers (U8P_GWILLIM::0398, U8P_GWILLIM::0A50, U8P_GWILLIM::10D3) that perform movement/dialog/animation.
GWILLIM::leaveFastArea performs reference cleanup (FREE::2A56) when leaving the fast-area trigger.
notable_control_flow: Event-driven: functions are dispatched by engine events (U8P_GWILLIM::look, theft, schedule, fast-area enter/leave).
Branching on global flags: metGwillim controls greeting in GWILLIM::look; guardsCalled and stolenOnce affect theft response branching and whether guards are summoned.
Schedule selection: GWILLIM::schedule loops/calls FREE::28F9 to choose a schedule index, writes gwillimSchedule, and spawns follow-up methods to enact it.
Fast-area immediate behaviors: enterFastArea reads gwillimSchedule and spawns one of several short helper routines to run immediately rather than executing a long schedule in-place.
Asynchronous actions via spawn: many behaviors are implemented by spawning small METHODs or other scripts (animations, guard-calling, timers) instead of inline blocking logic.
open_questions: Exact numeric meanings of schedule slot values returned by FREE::28F9 (what each gwillimSchedule value maps to in-game timing/locations) are inferred but not exact.
Precise contents and triggers of spawned helper scripts U8P_GWILLIM::0A50 and U8P_GWILLIM::10D3 are not present and only inferred as schedule variants.
The complete list of item types that trigger the more severe theft branch (guard calling) is inferred from type comparisons but not enumerated concretely here.
The semantics of some FREE::* helpers (FREE::1CE3, FREE::28F9 variants) are inferred from usage; their exact return ranges/meanings are unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_GWILLIM::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to a player 'U8P_GWILLIM::look' interaction by making the NPC speak an appropriate greeting. If the global flag metGwillim is unset (first meeting), use the first-meeting line; otherwise use the repeat greeting.
entry_conditions: Called with pid (viewer process id) and NPC reference as parameters

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::look
function_map.role: Handle the 'U8P_GWILLIM::look' (examine) event and produce greeting dialog.

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::AvatarStoleSomething
function_map.role: Handle theft events: record stolen item, check type, warn player, set stolenOnce and possibly call guards/timers.

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::schedule
function_map.role: Query scheduling system and set gwillimSchedule, spawn schedule enactment methods.

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::enterFastArea
function_map.role: React to entering a fast-area trigger: clear refs and spawn short behavior routine based on gwillimSchedule.

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit cleanup; release stored reference via FREE::2A56.

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::0398
function_map.role: Iterative scanning/selection routine used by fast-area schedule branch; examines item frames/slots and initiates pathfind/dialog actions.

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::0510
function_map.role: Randomized short activity routine used by schedule/enterFastArea: chooses actions via urandom, moves NPC, and emits varied dialog lines.

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::0A50
function_map.role: Schedule-variant short behavior spawned by enterFastArea (body not shown; inferred as movement/dialog variant).

function_map.name: U8P_GWILLIM::10D3
function_map.role: Schedule-variant short behavior spawned by enterFastArea (body not shown; inferred as movement/dialog variant).

internal_calls.purpose: Spawned when gwillimSchedule selects the corresponding schedule branch to perform a short, immediate behavior.
Alternate short behavior spawned based on gwillimSchedule value.
Alternate short behavior spawned based on gwillimSchedule value.
schedule may spawn or route into a richer short-activity routine to enact the chosen schedule (inferred from spawn patterns).
Spawned in a theft branch after setting stolenOnce to perform a follow-up animation or response sequence.

external_calls.purpose: Make the NPC speak a greeting string to the player/process.
Determine the stolen item's class/type to decide theft-response severity and whether to summon guards.
Get NPC facing direction before spawning a theft-reaction animation (METHOD::15E7).
Invoke guard-calling routine when a guard-worthy theft occurs and guards have not already been called.
Spawn or set a timer/timeout related to the guard/alarm response path.
Clear/ release reserved object or schedule reference slots prior to starting fast-area behavior.
Clear a stored reference when leaving the fast area (cleanup).
Query scheduling/timetable utility repeatedly to select an appropriate schedule slot/value.
Inspect frames/animation indices on items while scanning a set of world objects to decide actions.
Introduce variety into short-activity behavior (choose dialog/animation variants randomly).
Request NPC movement towards a selected target discovered by the scanner routine.

reads.name: metGwillim
reads.likely_effect: Selects greeting variant in GWILLIM::look (first-meeting vs repeat).

reads.name: guardsCalled
reads.likely_effect: Prevents repeated guard calls in theft handling; read to avoid re-invoking guard response.

reads.name: gwillimSchedule
reads.likely_effect: Selects which short behavior routine to spawn on fast-area enter; persists schedule selection from GWILLIM::schedule.

reads.name: somebodyTalking
reads.likely_effect: Read to avoid starting new dialog or actions when other speech is ongoing (avoid interrupting).

reads.name: stolenOnce
reads.likely_effect: Read to choose theft-response branch (different bark/behavior if theft previously occurred).

writes.name: stolenOnce
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 when a theft of certain item types is detected to suppress repeat warnings/alternate behavior later.

writes.name: gwillimSchedule
writes.likely_effect: Updated by GWILLIM::schedule to record the selected schedule slot for later use by enterFastArea and other behaviors.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides GWILLIM NPC behavior: handles player 'U8P_GWILLIM::look' interaction, theft reactions, schedule-driven short behaviors, and fast-area entry/exit cleanup.
